creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Le Baron d'Merde from comment #5)
> After reinstalling with debug support deskutils/owncloudclient shamefully do
> not segfault anymore, neither create a core dump file.
> 

Sorry for the delay.

It could have been a bug caused by some misalignment in the qt5 libraries. It sometimes happens when compiling and replacing libraries "below" other programs and libraries. I remember seeing something similar with owncloud some time ago.

So I'm closing this as it really is not a bug.

Thanks.
